description: Cross-version expected differences on the synthetic IV bolus dataset (S001, C0_true=100 ng/mL, k=0.15 1/h, dose=100 mg, no t=0 observation). All values engine-computed.

differences.reason: C0 method differs: v5.3 uses 'observed' (first quantifiable point = C(0.5h)), v6.4/v8.3 use 'log_back_extrap' (two-point back-extrapolation to t=0 recovering C0_true~100)

AUC method differs: v5.3 uses 'linear' trapezoid throughout; v6.4/v8.3 use 'linear_up_log_down'. For a purely declining exponential profile the log-down intervals underestimate relative to linear, giving a lower AUClast. Additionally the t=0 anchor differs (C0=92.77 vs 100.0).
Same root causes as AUClast: different C0 anchor and different integration method affect the first moment.

AUCINF_obs = AUClast + Clast/Lambda_z. AUClast differs between versions (linear vs linear_up_log_down + C0 anchor), so AUCINF_obs differs. v6.4/v8.3 converge to the true analytical value (100/0.15=666.67) because the log-down method is exact for exponential profiles.
Derived from AUMClast which differs by C0 and AUC method.
Ratio of tail to AUCINF_obs; changes because both AUClast and AUCINF_obs differ.
MRT = AUMCINF/AUCINF. Both numerator and denominator differ, producing a different MRT.
CL = Dose/AUCINF_obs. Since AUCINF_obs differs, CL differs. v6.4/v8.3 recover the true CL=0.15.
Vz = Dose/(Lambda_z * AUCINF_obs). Since AUCINF_obs differs, Vz differs.
Vss = CL * MRT_obs. Both CL and MRT differ between v5.3 and v6.4/v8.3.
All versions use Best Fit lambda_z regression on the same log-linear terminal phase points. The dataset is a pure monoexponential so all versions produce the same Lambda_z.
HL = ln(2)/Lambda_z. Lambda_z is identical across versions, so HL is identical.
Best Fit selects the same terminal points regardless of AUC method or C0 method.
R² of terminal log-linear regression is independent of AUC/C0 methods.
Adjusted R² same reasoning as Rsq.
Cmax is the maximum observed concentration — identical across versions.
Clast is the last observed quantifiable concentration — identical across versions.
Clast_pred is absent in v5.3 (output_pred_variants=False). v6.4 and v8.3 emit it.
AUCINF_pred is absent in v5.3 (output_pred_variants=False). v6.4 and v8.3 emit it.
Span = Lambda_z_upper - Lambda_z_lower. Same regression window in all versions.
Span_ratio = Span/HL. Lambda_z and Span are identical across versions.
